analysis.reasoning: The tweet frames the EU as advancing values and interests through an international agreement with China, focusing on eradicating forced labour (human rights), protecting the climate under the Paris Agreement, and promoting rule-based multilateralism. This maps to EU4 (avant-garde actor), EU5 (global champion of fair causes), and EU6 (contributes to a better world). It also implies a united bloc engaging externally, which aligns with EU2.
